positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune), rendered in strong geometric linework and negative space. The fox is positioned centrally, depicted in a graceful, rising posture, surrounded by swirling cosmic elements like crescent moons, stars, and stylized nebulae. The color palette should use deep indigo, burnt orange, and metallic gold accents against a stark off-white background. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a wearable apparel print. Vector art style, woodcut influence, high contrast, clean silhouette, divine, mythical, ethereal, highly detailed, UHD.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, messy, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, poor symmetry
